message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[\"remove\", 0], [\"remove\", -1], [\"update\", 1, 5], [\"add\", 100], [\"query\", 1], [\"update\", 1, -150], [\"query\", 1], [\"add\", 50], [\"query\", 2]]"],"focus":"invalid removals/updates before any adds; updates that could drive stock negative; ensure operations are safely ignored or clamped and indices shift after adds"},{"input_lines":["[[\"add\", 10], [\"add\", 20], [\"add\", 30], [\"add\", 40], [\"add\", 50], [\"query\", 5], [\"remove\", 3], [\"query\", 4], [\"update\", 2, 1000000], [\"add\", -100], [\"query\", 5], [\"remove\", 1], [\"remove\", 10], [\"query\", 3]]"],"focus":"middle removals that shift indices, very large delta update to test overflow handling, negative adds, and ignored out-of-range removal"},{"input_lines":["[[\"query\", 1], [\"add\", 0], [\"add\", 0], [\"add\", 1], [\"update\", 3, -1], [\"query\", 3], [\"remove\", 3], [\"query\", 3], [\"add\", 5], [\"add\", 7], [\"remove\", 2], [\"update\", 3, 3], [\"query\", 10]]"],"focus":"format-sensitive sequences: queries on empty, zeros as values, removals at ends, updates on recently-removed indices, and queries beyond current size"}]}
